summary.intent: Add 100+ default bundled skills to Moltis by embedding them in the binary, ported from Hermes Agent and OpenClaw repositories, with category metadata, web UI browsing, and auto-install for missing CLI dependencies.
summary.outcome: Successfully implemented the full bundled skills pipeline: BundledSkillStore with include_dir! embedding, CompositeSkillDiscoverer, category metadata, prompt format fallback, web UI with category filter/search/inline detail view, 100 skills from Hermes+OpenClaw with origin tracking, and skill CLI auto-install hints. PR #797 created and reviewed.

repo: Moltis uses include_dir! for binary embedding, same pattern as web UI assets in crates/web/src/assets/
Skill discovery has 4 sources (project/personal/registry/plugin); CompositeSkillDiscoverer adds Bundled as lowest priority
The REAL system prompt skill injection entry point is discover_skills_if_enabled() in crates/chat/src/prompt.rs, NOT in gateway — the gateway FsSkillDiscoverer wiring is for the web UI API only
Directory name must exactly match the frontmatter 'name' field for read_skill lookup to work; 6 skills had silent failures due to this mismatch
YAML unquoted values cannot start with '@'; scoped npm packages like @anthropic-ai/claude-code must be quoted
skill_tools.rs was refactored into skill_tools/ module directory between early and late session work, requiring conflict resolution on main merge
Biome formatter enforces strict indentation for arrow function bodies inside JSX — nested callbacks need one extra tab per nesting level
Clippy in this repo has -D clippy::expect-used, -D clippy::collapsible-if, -D clippy::unnecessary-map-or, -D clippy::manual-div-ceil all set as errors
check-file-size.sh enforces 1500-line limit and needs explicit exclusions for vendored/third-party directories (.moltis/ and assets/)
style.css conflicts during merges should be resolved by regenerating from Tailwind, not manual merge
Auto-install in ReadSkillTool runs on the gateway host process, but exec tool runs in the sandbox container — these are different environments

code.finding: The unused import warning revealed that both cfg branches had local use statements — the top-level SkillDiscoverer import was redundant
map_or(true, String::is_empty) should be is_none_or(String::is_empty) per clippy::unnecessary_map_or
(lo + hi + 1) / 2 must be written as (lo + hi).div_ceil(2) per clippy::manual_div_ceil
Nested if with if-let must be collapsed to single if with && let per clippy::collapsible_if
npm install with --ignore-scripts breaks scoped packages (@scope/pkg); removed the flag. Also: install runs on gateway host, not in sandbox where the agent executes
skill_detail handler had no branch for SkillSource::Bundled, causing click-to-view to silently fail for all bundled skills
Bundled skills were showing Disable button which shouldn't be interactive — need source check before rendering action buttons

workflow: Greptile automatically reviews PRs and leaves P1/P2 comments; run 'Fix and resolve PR comments' pattern after each push
local-validate.sh runs biome, fmt, tsc, zizmor, file-size, lint in parallel — all must pass before CI is clean
When merging main and a file was refactored into a directory, git shows it as deleted+new; accept theirs then re-apply changes manually
Skills from third-party repos need origin: frontmatter with source/url/version fields for provenance tracking
SKILL.md directory name must match frontmatter name field — tests can catch this at build time

friction: Six consecutive rounds of Clippy errors across different lint rules (manual_div_ceil, unnecessary_map_or, collapsible_if, expect_used, unused_import) — each required a separate fix+push cycle
Biome indentation kept failing 3 times with off-by-one tab errors that weren't caught by running biome locally (version mismatch between local and CI biome)
Auto-install silently ran on gateway host instead of sandbox, causing npm EINVALIDPACKAGENAME errors and installing to the wrong environment
The bundled skills weren't appearing in the agent's system prompt for an entire session because chat/src/prompt.rs was missed — only gateway wiring was updated initially
read_skill(file_path='') returned an error requiring a retry with null on every first call; LLMs consistently pass empty string for optional fields
YAML @ character caused parse failures in 5 skills that were only caught at runtime via WARN logs, not at build time
style.css conflict during merge was large (full generated Tailwind file) and couldn't be auto-resolved
skill_tools.rs → skill_tools/ module refactor on main required manually re-applying ~150 lines of changes after accepting their version
open_items: Two skills still reference Hermes-specific paths: 'plan' skill references .hermes/plans/ directory, 'google-workspace' skill references Hermes-managed OAuth2 setup
Auto-install should eventually run in the sandbox environment rather than the gateway host — currently only provides install hint text as workaround
Skills with missing binaries (eligible=false) could be annotated in the system prompt with eligible='false' attribute so agents know before attempting to use them
summarize skill install still failing with EINVALIDPACKAGENAME for @steipete/summarize — needs investigation of exact npm package name
No build-time validation that SKILL.md directory names match frontmatter name fields — currently only caught by tests or runtime WARN logs
